features.name: submod attribute on wire passed as submodule input
features.description: Code should include a wire marked with (* submod="..." *) attribute that is only used as an input to the submodule, where the wire is actually a primary output driving another signal

features.name: partial bus select in submodule port connection
features.description: Code should include a partial bus select (array slice) marked with (* submod="..." *) attribute where the entire bus gets incorrectly promoted to submodule output causing driver conflict

features.name: init attribute on register in submodule extraction
features.description: Code should include a register with (* init = ... *) attribute that is extracted into a submodule, where the attribute should be moved not copied to avoid duplicate initialization

features.name: submod attribute on module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation with (* submod="..." *) attribute applied to mark the instance for submodule extraction with specific naming
features.snippet:
(* submod="bar" *) sub s1(a, c);
(* submod="bar" *) DFF s1(.D(d), .C(c), .Q(q));
